title: TcpProfile
description: A TCP profile that defines how the BIG-IP processes TCP traffic, including connection settings, timeouts, and optimization.

abc.description: Whether Appropriate Byte Counting is enabled.

ackOnPush.description: Whether to send ACK on PUSH flag.

closeWaitTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for CLOSE-WAIT state.

finWaitTimeout.description: Timeout in seconds for FIN-WAIT state.

idleTimeout.description: Idle timeout in seconds. Connections idle longer than this value are closed.

keepAliveInterval.description: Interval in seconds between TCP keep-alive probes.

maxRetrans.description: Maximum number of TCP retransmission attempts.

receiveWindowSize.description: TCP receive window size in bytes.

sendBufferSize.description: TCP send buffer size in bytes.

timeWaitTimeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for TIME-WAIT state.
